evidence_boundary: Deterministic non-sample execution trace generated from the runtime manifest and a project-specific validation fixture. This is not hosted deployment proof and not independent human review.
input_summary: A Russia security judgment must compare official rhetoric, operational behavior, and historical pattern without overstating strategic intent.
evidence_or_constraint: Validation fixture only: the case tests whether the runtime can preserve claim boundaries, method constraints, and next-evidence needs. It does not assert that the substantive case has been independently adjudicated.
reviewer_standard: The output must separate source signal, interpretive claim, uncertainty, and next evidence need.

generated_result.working_judgment: The instrument processed a non-sample project case through Judgment handoff and produced a bounded operational record.
generated_result.mechanism_trace: Russia source-to-judgment workbench -> Judgment handoff -> Bounded Russia judgment
generated_result.next_required_evidence: Hosted deployment smoke and clearly labeled review or technical audit remain separate open gates.
generated_result.claim_boundary: Local runtime slice and deterministic non-sample trace only; not multi-user deployment, public-site byte match, or external validation.

acceptance_checks.name: non_sample_fixture
acceptance_checks.evidence: case text is project-specific and not copied from sample_fixture.json

acceptance_checks.name: reviewer_standard_present
acceptance_checks.evidence: The output must separate source signal, interpretive claim, uncertainty, and next evidence need.

acceptance_checks.name: trace_schema_fields
acceptance_checks.evidence: runtime_id, project_id, input, operation, output, checks, and trace hash are present
